project.title: Aurethos (Recovered)
project.description:
Aurethos is a land steeped in magic and political intrigue. The story follows individuals connected to powerful families as they navigate a world marked by a past cataclysm and present conflicts. The fate of Aurethos hinges on uncovering truths and challenging established powers.

Recovered from local YOW exports after account-switch data loss.

recovery.notes: Aurethos-2 supplied manuscript, timeline, lore, and most project data. Aurethos-3 supplied map/whiteboard/schedule fields where newer or non-empty.

characters.bio: Born in England, Alessia was raised unaware of her destiny in Aurethos. She is connected to a magical land and a great responsibility.
characters.name: Alessia Elarys

characters.bio: A member of the Ardryn family, Cara's role in the unfolding events is yet to be defined.
characters.name: Cara Ardryn

characters.bio: A member of the Ardryn family.
characters.name: Irienne Ardryn

characters.bio: A member of the Elarys family.
characters.name: Lewin Elarys

characters.bio: An antagonist, a member of the Ardryn family.
characters.name: Liandros Ardryn

characters.bio: A member of the Elarys family and an ally to Vaelon Szole.
characters.name: Norra Elarys

characters.bio: A member of the Ardryn family and an antagonist.
characters.name: Ria Ardryn

characters.bio: A member of the Ardryn family and father to Cara and Ria.
characters.name: Tavin Ardryn

factions.name: The Cavalis
factions.description: The people/forces of the hidden city of Cavalis.

factions.name: The Linzai Forces
factions.description: The Armed forces of Linzai, allied to the Ardryns.

factions.name: The Valleron Forces
factions.description: The armed forces of the Valleron region, allied to The Verities.

factions.name: The Verities
factions.description: Founded in 826, the Verities aim to reveal the truth about the Aurethi trees and free magic for all.

locations.name: Elarya
locations.description: Home of the Elarys family, a city of knowledge surrounded by sacred groves. It is now hollow and depleted after Liandros took control.

locations.name: Linzai
locations.description: The capital city of Aurethos, a populous city with a unique layout centered around the royal grounds.

locations.name: Val
locations.description: The Mountain City of Valleron, a hub for trade and craftsmanship with a growing population despite challenging terrain.

timeline.title: The Great Star Storm
timeline.description: A storm brought magic to Aurethos, originating from the heavens and impacting the Startouch Mountains.

timeline.title: The Madness
timeline.description: Following the storm, madness spread, affecting animals and then humans. The crisis culminated in the death of the Valleron royal family.

timeline.title: The Well of Starlight
timeline.description: Located in the Startouch Mountains, this well was a source of power before the age of kingdoms. It flowed with magic that nourished the land.

duties to Liandros after the death of his wife.

The Verities
The Verities were founded by Irienne Ardryn in the year 826. They are a resistance with the goal of
revealing the truth of the Aurethi trees, and freeing the magic to be used by all

scenes.title: CHARACTER ART
scenes.content:
OVERVIEW
Alessia was born in England to her mother, Norra. She
was raised in a small village, living a relatively
normal life. Her mother told her stories of a magical
land and a young girl with tremendous responsibility,
but otherwise Alessia had no knowledge of Aurethos,
its troubles, or the role she was to play. When she...
ROLE
Protagonist
FAMILY
Elarys
scenes.synopsis: Alessia is introduced as the protagonist, born in England with a hidden connection to the magical land of Aurethos and a significant destiny.

scenes.title: WORLD HISTORY
scenes.content:
The Great Star Storm
01
Undated
A great storm brought starlight and magic screaming from the heavens to
the startouch mountains. the mountains erupted with power, and it began
flowing through the realm.
scenes.synopsis: The Great Star Storm brought magic & starlight to Aurethos, transforming the Startouch Mountains and initiating a new era.

scenes.title: ENCYCLOPEDIA ARTICLE
scenes.content:
Linzai
City - map
The Capital city of Aurethos and home to the Ardryns. It is the most populous city, with a unique layout.
Nestled at the fork in the river, the royal grounds which span over 50 acres occupy both sides of the
fork. Immediately adjacent to the royal grounds is the most affluent and least populated area. then is
the biggest and most populated area, the hub of trade. and then finally is Oskir, the outskirts where...
L
scenes.synopsis: Linzai is presented as the capital city of Aurethos and the Ardryn family's home, characterized by a unique layout and bustling trade.

scenes.title: ENCYCLOPEDIA ARTICLE
scenes.content:
Val
City - map
The Mountain City of the region of Valleron. Aurethos's second most populous city, Val is a hub for
market trade and the working class. Known for mining, lumbering, and incredible craftsmanship, the city
has grown and continues to expand despite the challenging terrain surrounding them. The city was once
ruled by the Cavions until they disappeared. After the unification of all regions, it is now ruled by...
V
scenes.synopsis: Val City in the region of Valleron is revealed as a hub for trade and craftsmanship, formerly ruled by the Cavions before unification.

scenes.content:
Gates
Magic System
Gates are ways of travelling quickly throughout the realm. they are difficult to create with wand magic,
and so are only used by those with great wealth and power. the process
G

scenes.title: ENCYCLOPEDIA ARTICLE
scenes.content:
Elarya
City - map
Home of the Elarys family. A magnificent city of knowledge, surrounded by the sacred aurethi groves. the
third most populous city in Aurethos. After the murder of the Elarys, King Liandros took over the city
and the aurethi groves. he slowly stripped away the people's access to knowledge, and many people left
for opportunities elsewhere. by the time our story begins, the city is hollow, only about five percent...
E
scenes.synopsis: Elarya is described as a city of knowledge once thriving, but now declining after the Elarys family's murder and Liandros's subsequent rule.

scenes.title: LORE ENCYCLOPEDIA
scenes.content:
Regions
Politics
There are 5 regions in Aurethos. For many years, they were ruled independently but had no problems
between them.
R
scenes.synopsis: Aurethos is depicted as a realm once composed of independent, peaceful regions.

scenes.title: WORLD HISTORY
scenes.content:
The Well of Starlight
Mythic Age - Well of Starlight, Startouch Mountains, Great Star Storm, Magic Origin, Mythic Age
03
Mythic Age
nestled at the very peak of the Startouch Mountains,Before the age of
kingdoms and civilizations, this spring was a place of quiet power,
attuned to the subtle energies of Aurethos. A cosmic event thousands of
years ago brought magic to the land, it flowed from the well through
the rivers and into everything around it. Magical animals, plants, and
humans lived in harmony with the power for millennia. However, it was
during the Great Star Storm that the Well's destiny was forever...
scenes.synopsis: The Well of Starlight in the Startouch Mountains is described as the origin of magic in Aurethos, disrupted by the Great Star Storm.

scenes.title: WORLD HISTORY
scenes.content:
The Madness
02
Undated
It did not take long after the storm for madness to start to appear. It
was slow growing at first, affecting animals before humans, but within
50 years the first signs of magic in humans were seen by those who
lived closest to the startouch mountains. During this time, the madness
got progressively worse. Entire villages, and then cities were lost.
The breaking point was the death of the royal family for the Valleron
region, and the remaining rulers got together to come up with a plan.
scenes.synopsis: Following the Star Storm, ‘The Madness’ gripped the land, causing widespread chaos, loss, and eventually prompting the rulers to unite against the growing threat.

loreEntries.title: Gates
loreEntries.content: Gates are a method of fast travel, but are difficult to create and primarily used by the wealthy and powerful.

loreEntries.title: Regions
loreEntries.content: There are 5 regions, historically independent but peaceful.

storySchedule.title: Grounding Day Ceremony
storySchedule.description: The 200th Grounding Day is celebrated with a ceremony where King Liandros bestows three powerful wands upon his general and the Lords of the other two kingdoms, but the wands he presents have been replaced with ash
